vi.name: React Roadmap
vi.summary: Lộ trình React đầy đủ hơn cho frontend hiện đại: bắt đầu từ JavaScript/TypeScript, mental model và component fundamentals, sau đó đi sâu vào state architecture, data fetching, performance, testing, bridge sang Next.js và kết thúc bằng interview prep.

milestones.title: JavaScript & TypeScript for React
milestones.description: Củng cố modern JavaScript trước khi vào React: scope, closure, hoisting, this, thao tác array/object, promise, async/await, modules, destructuring, spread/rest và phần TypeScript cơ bản gồm type, interface, union, generic, typing props, API response, event handlers và utility types nền tảng.

milestones.title: React Mental Model
milestones.description: Đặt mental model đúng ngay từ đầu với declarative UI, component tree, props down events up, pure rendering, render vs commit, state as snapshot, data flow và cách nghĩ controlled vs uncontrolled theo tinh thần Thinking in React.

milestones.title: JSX, Components & Composition
milestones.description: Đi qua JSX rules, component, props, children, conditional rendering, lists and keys, composition, reusable UI components và phân biệt presentational với container components để bắt đầu xây UI có cấu trúc.

milestones.title: State, Events & Rendering
milestones.description: Làm chủ useState, event handling, derived state, batching, rendering behavior, local state vs shared state, lifting state up và các lỗi state phổ biến để hiểu vì sao component re-render và state nên được đặt ở đâu.

milestones.title: Effects, Refs & Escape Hatches
milestones.description: Học useEffect đúng bản chất là đồng bộ với hệ thống bên ngoài, nắm cleanup, dependency array, tránh unnecessary effects, useRef, DOM refs, previous value pattern, external subscriptions và race condition basics.

milestones.title: Forms, Validation & User Input
milestones.description: Xây milestone riêng cho form theo hướng React 2026 với controlled inputs, form state, validation, error UX, async submit, pending state, optimistic UI, useActionState, useOptimistic và form accessibility.

milestones.title: Custom Hooks & Reusable Logic
milestones.description: Tách logic lặp lại thành custom hooks có cấu trúc với hook composition, data hook vs UI hook, useDebounce, useLocalStorage, useDisclosure, usePrevious, useClickOutside và các lỗi hook thường gặp khi scale codebase.

milestones.title: Real-world UI Components
milestones.description: Chốt roadmap bằng component thực chiến kiểu interview/frontend job: component API design, controlled/uncontrolled components, accessibility, keyboard navigation, focus management, responsive layout, loading/error/empty states và compound components pattern.

milestones.title: State Architecture
milestones.description: Mở rộng từ local state sang state architecture với when local state is enough, context boundaries, useReducer, server state vs client state, URL state, form state, global state, tổng quan Zustand/Redux Toolkit và cách ra quyết định state placement.

milestones.title: Data Fetching, Routing & App Structure
milestones.description: Đi vào fetching patterns, loading/error/empty states, pagination, infinite query, cache mindset, routing, layouts, API integration, folder structure và feature-based architecture để app không chỉ chạy được mà còn có tổ chức.

milestones.title: Performance & Optimization
milestones.description: Học performance theo hướng React 2026: rendering cost, memoization, React.memo, useMemo, useCallback, React Compiler mindset, list virtualization, code splitting, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals basics, profiling, useTransition và useDeferredValue, với trọng tâm là đo trước khi tối ưu.

milestones.title: Testing React Apps
milestones.description: Bổ sung testing như một phần bắt buộc của roadmap với unit test, component test, React Testing Library, user-event testing, mock API, accessibility test, E2E basics with Playwright và nguyên tắc test user behavior thay vì implementation details.

milestones.title: Modern React & Next.js Bridge
milestones.description: Đưa React sang mức advanced/bridge với Suspense, Error Boundary, Server Components, client/server boundary, Server Actions concept, streaming, hydration basics, use, useActionState, useOptimistic và cách nối sang Next.js App Router.

milestones.title: React Interview Prep
milestones.description: Biến toàn bộ kiến thức thành năng lực trả lời phỏng vấn với explain rendering, explain hooks, debug effects, optimize re-renders, build component live, discuss state architecture, review accessibility, React quiz và mock interview notes.

outcomes: Đi từ nền JavaScript/TypeScript đủ dùng cho React thay vì nhảy thẳng vào hooks khi nền còn hổng.
Hiểu React theo đúng mental model rồi mở rộng dần sang state architecture, data fetching, performance và testing.
Xây được UI thực tế với component composition, forms, custom hooks, global state decisions và app structure rõ ràng hơn.
Sẵn sàng hơn cho bài tập interview frontend nhờ nhóm real-world UI components, architecture prompts, quiz và mock interview practice.
Có cầu nối rõ ràng từ React core sang Modern React và Next.js App Router thay vì học rời rạc.

support.title: Phù hợp cho ai?
support.description: Phù hợp với người muốn học React có thứ tự rõ ràng, thực dụng, bám sát công việc frontend thực tế từ core fundamentals đến state architecture, testing, Next.js bridge và interview preparation.
items: Người đã biết JavaScript cơ bản nhưng còn hổng nền khi bắt đầu học React
Frontend developer muốn hệ thống lại mental model, state, effects, forms, data fetching và performance theo React hiện đại
Người đang luyện interview hoặc UI coding cần một roadmap đi đến cả component practice, testing và architecture discussion

en.name: React Roadmap
en.summary: A fuller React roadmap for modern frontend work: start with enough JavaScript and TypeScript, build the right mental model, then move through components, state architecture, data fetching, performance, testing, the Next.js bridge, and interview preparation.

milestones.title: JavaScript & TypeScript for React
milestones.description: Cover the JavaScript foundation React learners actually need: scope, closure, hoisting, this, array and object manipulation, promises, async/await, modules, destructuring, spread/rest, plus TypeScript basics like type, interface, union, generic, typing props, API responses, event handlers, and core utility types.

milestones.title: React Mental Model
milestones.description: Start React the right way with declarative UI, component trees, props down events up, pure rendering, render vs commit, state as snapshot, data flow, and controlled vs uncontrolled thinking inspired by Thinking in React.

milestones.title: JSX, Components & Composition
milestones.description: Work through JSX rules, components, props, children, conditional rendering, lists and keys, composition, reusable UI components, and the distinction between presentational and container components.

milestones.title: State, Events & Rendering
milestones.description: Learn useState, event handling, derived state, state update batching, rendering behavior, local vs shared state, lifting state up, and the common mistakes that cause confusing re-renders and messy state placement.

milestones.title: Effects, Refs & Escape Hatches
milestones.description: Treat effects as synchronization with external systems, then build strong intuition for cleanup, dependency arrays, avoiding unnecessary effects, refs, DOM access, previous-value patterns, subscriptions, and race condition basics.

milestones.title: Forms, Validation & User Input
milestones.description: Give forms their own modern milestone with controlled inputs, form state, validation, async submit, pending state, optimistic UI, useActionState, useOptimistic, better error UX, and accessible form patterns.

milestones.title: Custom Hooks & Reusable Logic
milestones.description: Extract repeated logic into custom hooks through hook composition, data hooks vs UI hooks, useDebounce, useLocalStorage, useDisclosure, usePrevious, useClickOutside, and the mistakes teams commonly make when abstracting too early or too loosely.

milestones.title: Real-world UI Components
milestones.description: Finish with the most interview-relevant and job-relevant layer: component API design, controlled vs uncontrolled components, accessibility, keyboard navigation, focus management, responsive layout, state variants, and compound components patterns.

milestones.title: State Architecture
milestones.description: Expand beyond local state into state architecture: when local state is enough, context boundaries, reducers, server vs client state, URL state, form state, global state, a practical overview of Zustand and Redux Toolkit, and better state placement decisions.

milestones.title: Data Fetching, Routing & App Structure
milestones.description: Cover fetching patterns, loading/error/empty states, pagination, infinite query, cache mindset, routing, layouts, API integration, folder structure, and feature-based architecture so the app stays maintainable as it grows.

milestones.title: Performance & Optimization
milestones.description: Teach performance with a 2026 mindset: rendering cost, memoization, React.memo, useMemo, useCallback, React Compiler mindset, virtualization, code splitting, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals basics, profiling, useTransition, and useDeferredValue, with strong emphasis on measuring before optimizing.

milestones.title: Testing React Apps
milestones.description: Make testing a core milestone with unit tests, component tests, React Testing Library, user-event testing, mocked APIs, accessibility tests, Playwright basics, and the principle of testing user behavior instead of implementation details.

milestones.title: Modern React & Next.js Bridge
milestones.description: Treat modern React as an advanced bridge section with Suspense, Error Boundaries, Server Components, client/server boundaries, Server Actions concepts, streaming, hydration basics, use, useActionState, useOptimistic, and the Next.js App Router mental model.

milestones.title: React Interview Prep
milestones.description: Turn the roadmap into interview-ready explanation and coding skill through render explanations, hook explanations, effect debugging, re-render optimization, live component building, state architecture discussion, accessibility review, quizzes, and mock interview notes.

outcomes: Build from enough JavaScript and TypeScript for React instead of jumping into hooks with shaky fundamentals.
Understand React through the right mental model, then extend that into state architecture, data fetching, performance, and testing.
Ship more practical UI with composition, forms, custom hooks, global state decisions, and clearer app structure.
Prepare more directly for frontend interviews through real-world UI components, architecture prompts, quizzes, and mock interview practice.
Bridge more cleanly from React core concepts into modern React patterns and the Next.js App Router.

support.title: Who is this for?
support.description: A strong fit for learners who want a practical React progression that mirrors real frontend work from core fundamentals through architecture, testing, the Next.js bridge, and interview prep.
items: Learners who know basic JavaScript but still have gaps before React starts feeling solid
Frontend developers who want to reset their mental model around state, effects, forms, data fetching, and performance in modern React
People preparing for frontend interviews or UI coding rounds who want one path covering components, testing, and architecture discussion

ja.name: React Roadmap
ja.role: フロントエンド開発者
ja.summary: JavaScript と TypeScript の基礎から始め、mental model、components、state architecture、data fetching、performance、testing、Next.js bridge、interview prep まで広げる React 学習ルートです。

milestones.title: JavaScript & TypeScript for React
milestones.description: React に入る前に必要な JavaScript / TypeScript を固めます。scope、closure、hoisting、this、array / object 操作、Promise、async/await、modules、destructuring、spread/rest、そして type、interface、union、generic、props や API response の typing まで扱います。

milestones.title: React Mental Model
milestones.description: Thinking in React の考え方に沿って、declarative UI、component tree、props down events up、pure rendering、render vs commit、state as snapshot、data flow を理解します。

milestones.title: JSX, Components & Composition
milestones.description: JSX rules、components、props、children、conditional rendering、lists and keys、composition、reusable UI components、presentational と container の違いを学びます。

milestones.title: State, Events & Rendering
milestones.description: useState、event handling、derived state、batching、rendering behavior、local state と shared state、lifting state up、よくある state mistakes を整理します。

milestones.title: Effects, Refs & Escape Hatches
milestones.description: useEffect を外部システムとの同期として捉え、cleanup、dependency array、不要な effect の回避、useRef、DOM refs、previous value pattern、subscriptions、race condition basics を学びます。

milestones.title: Forms, Validation & User Input
milestones.description: controlled inputs、form state、validation、async submit、pending state、optimistic UI、useActionState、useOptimistic、form accessibility を React 2026 向けにまとめて学びます。

milestones.title: Custom Hooks & Reusable Logic
milestones.description: hook composition、data hook と UI hook の違い、useDebounce、useLocalStorage、useDisclosure、usePrevious、useClickOutside といった reusable logic の作り方を学びます。

milestones.title: Real-world UI Components
milestones.description: 最後は component API design、controlled / uncontrolled components、accessibility、keyboard navigation、focus management、responsive layout、compound components pattern など、実務と interview に近い UI components に集中します。

milestones.title: State Architecture
milestones.description: local state で十分な場面、context boundaries、useReducer、server state と client state、URL state、form state、global state、Zustand / Redux Toolkit の概要、state placement decisions を整理します。

milestones.title: Data Fetching, Routing & App Structure
milestones.description: fetching patterns、loading / error / empty states、pagination、infinite query、cache mindset、routing、layouts、API integration、folder structure、feature-based architecture を学びます。

milestones.title: Performance & Optimization
milestones.description: rendering cost、memoization、React.memo、useMemo、useCallback、React Compiler mindset、list virtualization、code splitting、lazy loading、Core Web Vitals basics、profiling、useTransition、useDeferredValue を、計測してから最適化する姿勢で学びます。

milestones.title: Testing React Apps
milestones.description: unit test、component test、React Testing Library、user-event testing、mock API、accessibility test、Playwright の基本、そして implementation details ではなく user behavior を test する考え方を学びます。

milestones.title: Modern React & Next.js Bridge
milestones.description: Suspense、Error Boundary、Server Components、client/server boundary、Server Actions concept、streaming、hydration basics、use、useActionState、useOptimistic、Next.js App Router bridge を advanced section として扱います。

milestones.title: React Interview Prep
milestones.description: rendering explanation、hooks explanation、effect debugging、re-render optimization、live component building、state architecture discussion、accessibility review、quiz、mock interview notes を通して interview 対応力へ変換します。

outcomes: React の前提になる JavaScript / TypeScript を十分に固めてから進めます。
declarative UI、state snapshot、data flow を軸にしつつ、state architecture、data fetching、performance、testing まで広げられます。
components、forms、custom hooks、global state decisions、app structure を通して実務に近い UI を作れるようになります。
Tabs、Modal、Dropdown、Data Table、File Explorer などの UI practice に加え、architecture prompts や mock interview までつなげられます。
React core から modern React と Next.js App Router への橋渡しも見通しよく学べます。

support.title: こんな人におすすめ
support.description: 抽象的すぎる roadmap ではなく、実際の frontend 開発に近い順序で core から architecture、testing、Next.js bridge、interview prep まで学びたい人に向いています。
items: 基本的な JavaScript は分かるが React に入る前の土台に不安がある人
modern React の state、effects、forms、data fetching、performance を整理し直したい frontend developer
UI coding や frontend interview に向けて component practice、testing、architecture discussion まで強化したい人
